text:
我的 Bash 测验让你崩溃了吗？

在下面的评论中告诉我吧！ ### 进一步阅读 提升 Bash 技能，请参考以下资源： - [Bash Guide](https://www.gnu.org/software/bash/manual/bash.html) - [BashFAQ](http://mywiki.wooledge.org/BashFAQ) - [ShellCheck](https://www.shellcheck.net/) - [Bash Academy](https://guide.bash.academy/) - [Bash Scripting Tutorial](https://ryanstutorials.net/bash-scripting-tutorial/) - [Bash Reference Manual](https://www.gnu.org/software/bash/manual/bash.html) - [Bash Hackers Wiki](http://wiki.bash-hackers.org/) - [Bash Guide for Beginners](http://tldp.org/LDP/Bash-Beginners-Guide/html/index.html) - [Bash Reference Card](http://www.tldp.org/LDP/Bash-Beginners-Guide/html/Bash-Beginners-Guide.html)
